title: rubus reconditifolius
intro: Rubus reconditifolius, also known as the Higo blackthorn or Japanese thimbleberry, is a species of bramble in the rose family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and inflammation. The health benefits of Rubus reconditifolius berries include their antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce the risk of chronic diseases. Rubus reconditifolius berries can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and jams, and have also been used in traditional Japanese medicine for centuries.
